zh.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens是John Jennens和Mary Weaman的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens是John Jennens和Mary Weaman的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Jennens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jennings
meanings: English: variant of Jenning , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from a pet form (see Jenning ) of the personal name Johannes (see John ).

nameMeanings.name: Humfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens was born as the son of John Jennens and Mary Weaman. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens est né, fils de John Jennens et Mary Weaman. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens wurde, als Sohn von John Jennens und Mary Weaman geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens è nato il come figlio di John Jennens e Mary Weaman. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Humfrey JennensはJohn JennensとMary Weamanの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens(은)는 John Jennens(와)과 Mary Weaman의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens nasceu filho de John Jennens e Mary Weaman. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Humfrey Jennens родился. Его родителей звали John Jennens и Mary Weaman. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.
